Scenario 77

In this scenario, the physical goals of Yellow robot are going to Tree and Axe and the social goals of Yellow robot are competing for the tree. The physical goals of Red robot are going to Fire and Tree and the social goals of Red robot are exchanging the wood on fire and water on fire.

## Interactions
Level 0 Level 1
Level 2 Level 3
--- ## Results Yellow (Level 2)
Red (Level 1)
Model Tree Fire Saw
Human
